top_signals.title: Oil Selloff Deepens as Iran Deal Spurs Brent’s Fifth Daily Loss
top_signals.summary: Oil headed for the longest losing run in 10 months on gathering expectations that a US-Iran deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz will unleash a wave of supply, loosening the global crude market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: India temporarily blocks Telegram over medical exam cheating fears
top_signals.summary: Authorities said scammers previously exploited the feature by posting fake exam questions before the test and later replacing them with the real questions, making it look like they had leaked the exam in advance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
